name: Sandbox Banking Integration
description: Field hierarchy for a Glyue integration workflow definition as managed by the Sandbox Banking (nCino Integration Gateway) platform.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique integration identifier (system-assigned).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable integration name.

fields.name: description
fields.description: What this integration does and which systems it connects.
fields.example: Transfers booked loan data from nCino LOS to Fiserv Signature core banking.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status of the integration.

fields.name: integrationType
fields.description: Integration pattern type.

fields.name: sourceSystem
fields.description: Name of the system that sends data into this integration.

fields.name: targetSystem
fields.description: Name of the system that receives data from this integration.

fields.name: serviceRequests
fields.description: Ordered sequence of service request adapter steps.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Service request identifier.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Service request name.

fields.name: adapter
fields.description: Adapter identifier (e.g., fiserv_signature, jack_henry_symitar).

fields.name: operation
fields.description: Operation name within the adapter.

fields.name: sequence
fields.description: Execution order (1-based).

fields.name: callForEach
fields.description: Whether this service request iterates over a list of inputs.

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Whether this service request is active.

fields.name: fieldMappings
fields.description: Field mapping rules that transform source data to target format.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Field mapping identifier.

fields.name: sourceField
fields.description: Source field path or Python expression.

fields.name: targetField
fields.description: Target field path in the destination system.

fields.name: transform
fields.description: Optional Python expression for data transformation.

fields.name: valueMapping
fields.description: Reference to a value mapping table for enum translation.

fields.name: required
fields.description: Whether this field mapping is required.

fields.name: validationRules
fields.description: Pre-execution validation rules that must pass before integration proceeds.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Validation rule identifier.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Rule name.

fields.name: condition
fields.description: Boolean Python expression that must evaluate to True.

fields.name: errorMessage
fields.description: Error message returned if validation fails.
fields.example: Loan amount must be greater than zero.

fields.name: sequence
fields.description: Validation execution order.

fields.name: auditEnabled
fields.description: Whether run history audit logging is enabled (required for GLBA/FFIEC compliance).

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the integration was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the integration was last modified.
